reasons: Tigreal can group enemies and give Alpha a clear Spear of Alpha follow-up.
Alpha benefits because his area damage and sustain work better when enemies are controlled nearby.

proof.summary: Tigreal starts the grouped engage, and Alpha follows with Spear of Alpha plus Beta damage.
worksBestWhen: Alpha waits for Tigreal's confirmed engage before using ultimate.
Alpha has enough health to continue fighting after entering.
failureCases: Alpha ults before enemies are grouped.

reasons: Atlas can drag enemies into a compact area for Alpha's follow-up.
Alpha can enter after the drag and apply repeated area damage and true-damage pressure.

proof.summary: Atlas pulls enemies together, while Alpha follows with close-range area damage and control.
worksBestWhen: Alpha saves Spear of Alpha until Atlas's drag finishes.
Alpha can reach the landing area immediately.
failureCases: Alpha cannot reach the landing area.

reasons: Angela helps Alpha survive while he stays in melee range.
Alpha's sustain pattern becomes more reliable when he receives extra protection during the first commit.

proof.summary: Angela protects Alpha's extended-fight window while Alpha keeps applying Beta damage.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches when Alpha commits into multiple enemies.
Alpha continues fighting during the protection window.
failureCases: Alpha is bursted before Angela attaches.

reasons: Mathilda helps Alpha reach targets or reset after using Spear of Alpha.
The shield and movement support improve Alpha's reliability in skirmishes.

proof.summary: Mathilda provides mobility and shield support so Alpha can enter or leave fights more safely.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays near Alpha's engage path.
Alpha uses the mobility support to reach a target he can keep fighting.
failureCases: Alpha engages beyond Mathilda's support range.
Enemies disengage before Alpha can continue damage.

reasons: Minotaur adds healing and knock-up control around Alpha's melee fight.
This helps Alpha stay active long enough for repeated skill cycles.

proof.summary: Minotaur stabilizes the fight with healing and control while Alpha continues close-range damage.
worksBestWhen: Minotaur and Alpha enter together instead of staggered.
Alpha fights inside Minotaur's control and sustain area.
failureCases: Alpha is isolated away from Minotaur's healing or control area.
Minotaur's control misses during Alpha's commit.
